description: Marketplace for the ship-loop plugin: one command from vague idea (or PRD) to a shipped, commercializable product.

plugins.name: ship-loop
plugins.description: One command from vague idea (or PRD) to a shipped product: human-rich design intake, then an autonomous build loop with contract-negotiated adversarial verification, a living feature list, self-evolution, and keys-unlocked real deployment.
